scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: First-year applicants should submit official transcripts of all high school and college coursework completed.
areas.detail: First-year applicants should submit official transcripts of all high school and college coursework completed.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: One letter is required from either your school counselor or a teacher from your school. Some programs may require additional letters of recommendation. Refer to the Additional Application Requirements section below for more information.
areas.detail: One letter is required from either your school counselor or a teacher from your school. Some programs may require additional letters of recommendation. Refer to the Additional Application Requirements section below for more information.
